config.title: Lista dostaw #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'view_message #include "50516"
'std_openform_object_hli #include "50200"
'choose_opakowanie_lp #include "50606"
'HARUI_PRICE #include "50101"
dim g_nLPOp: g_nLPOp = CLng(0) dim g_nNumOp: g_nNumOp = CLng(0)
dim g_pPosition:set g_pPosition = nothing
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' choose_supply ' ' Dokonuje wyboru dostawy ' ' pPozDokMag - obiekt pozycji dokumentu magazynowego ' bDisplayNoResults - czy gdy brak rezultatów to otwierać okienko z ' komunikatem (true) czy pokazywać w oknie ' komunikatów standardowym (false) ' ' RESULT: true gdy wybrano dostawe inaczej false '--------------------------------------------------------------------------- function choose_supply(byref pPozDokMag, byval bDisplayNoResults): choose_supply = false
dim pNaprawaMod set pNaprawaMod = doc_.getmodule( PAGE_UTIL_NAPRAWA_BAZY )
if (not pNaprawaMod.gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(false)) then view_message 6312, 0 exit function end if
set g_pPosition = pPozDokMag
dim pSupplyCursor set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true,"")
if (pSupplyCursor is nothing) then view_message 6310, 0 exit function end if
fill_table pSupplyCursor , bDisplayNoResults
choose_supply = (page_.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE)
end function
function choose_supply_manual(byref pProdukt): choose_supply_manual = false if not doc_.getmodule(60253).gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(false) then view_message 6312, 0 exit function end if
'wybór opakowania dim pOpak dim lp: lp = clng(1) if pProdukt.listOpakowania.count > clng(1) then lp = choose_opakowanie_lp(pProdukt) end if if lp > clng(0) then set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(lp) else exit function end if
dim pSupplyCursor set pSupplyCursor = trans_.createadors(doc_.getmodule(60300).bqry_gm_aktywne_dostawy(pProdukt.idObj,pOpak.idObj,0))
if (pSupplyCursor is nothing) then view_message 6310, 0 exit function end if
fill_table_manual pSupplyCursor
choose_supply_manual = (page_.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE)
end function
function fill_table(pSupplyCursor , byval bDisplayNoResults)
dim pTab set pTab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_RESULT)).section_body.removeall
if (pSupplyCursor.EOF) then if (bDisplayNoResults) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_RESULT_HEAD).hide = true 'page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_INFO).hide = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_OPERATIONS).hide = true else view_message 6311, 0 exit function end if else
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_NORESULT).hide = true
while (not pSupplyCursor.EOF)
dim nNumOpMag nNumOpMag = CLng(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_nNumOp").value)
dim nLP nLP = CLng(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_nLP").value)
dim curCena curCena = CCur(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_curCena").value)
dim curIloscOpak curIloscOpak = CCur(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_curIlosc").value)
dim dDataWazn dDataWazn = cdate(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_dDataWazn").value)
pTab.newrow
if ((pTab.rownr-1) mod 2) = 0 then pTab.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if
dim pHli set pHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='supply_on_choice' vn##PROP_NUMOP='" + CStr(nNumOpMag) + "' vn##PROP_LPOP='" + CStr(nLP) + "'")
pTab.newcell.addtexthli CStr(nNumOpMag) + " / " + CStr(nLP) , pHli pTab.cell.align = 1 pTab.element.tip = "Kliknij aby wskazać dostawę"
dim idDokMag:idDokMag = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, "nNumOper="+ cstr(nNumOpMag)) dim pDokMag if idDokMag>0 then set pDokMag = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,idDokMag) pTab.newcell.addtexthli pDokMag.strNrDok , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKMAG' vn2='"+cstr(pDokMag.idobj)+"'") pTab.cell.align = 1 pTab.element.tip = "Kliknij aby obejrzeć dostawę" else pTab.newcell end if
pTab.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(curCena, "") pTab.cell.align = 1
pTab.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curIloscOpak, "", 0) pTab.cell.align = 1
pTab.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dDataWazn) pTab.cell.align = 1
pSupplyCursor.MoveNext
wend end if 'not EOF
end function
function fill_table_manual(pSupplyCursor) dim pTab set pTab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_RESULT)).section_body.removeall
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_RESULT_HEAD).hide = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_OPERATIONS).hide = true if pSupplyCursor.EOF then view_message 6311, 0 exit function else
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_NORESULT).hide = true
'nagłowek pTab.newrow pTab.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTab.newcell.addtext "Numer / LP" pTab.newcell.addtext "Numer dokumentu" if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then pTab.newcell.addtext "Cena" end if pTab.newcell.addtext "Ilość" pTab.newcell.addtext "Data ważności" pTab.newcell.addtext "Magazyn"
while (not pSupplyCursor.EOF)
dim nNumOpMag nNumOpMag = CLng(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_nNumOp").value)
dim nLP nLP = CLng(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_nLP").value)
dim curCena curCena = CCur(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_curCena").value)
dim curIloscOpak curIloscOpak = CCur(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_curIlosc").value)
dim dDataWazn dDataWazn = cdate(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_dDataWazn").value)
dim idMag, strMagazyn idMag = CLng(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_pMag").value) if idMag > clng(0) then strMagazyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,idMag).strNazwa end if
pTab.newrow
if ((pTab.rownr-1) mod 2) = 0 then pTab.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if
pTab.newcell.addtext CStr(nNumOpMag) + "/" + CStr(nLP) pTab.cell.align = 1
dim idDokMag:idDokMag = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, "nNumOper="+ cstr(nNumOpMag)) dim pDokMag if idDokMag>0 then set pDokMag = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,idDokMag) pTab.newcell.addtexthli pDokMag.strNrDok , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKMAG' vn2='"+cstr(pDokMag.idobj)+"'") pTab.cell.align = 1 pTab.element.tip = "Kliknij aby obejrzeć dostawę" else pTab.newcell end if
if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then pTab.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(curCena, "") pTab.cell.align = 1 end if
pTab.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(curIloscOpak, "", 0) pTab.cell.align = 1
pTab.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dDataWazn) pTab.cell.align = 1
pTab.newcell.addtext strMagazyn pTab.cell.align = 1
pSupplyCursor.MoveNext wend end if
end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Reakcja na wybranie dostawy '--------------------------------------------------------------------------- function supply_on_choice(byref pHli) g_nLPOp = pHli.prop(PROP_LPOP) g_nNumOp = pHli.prop(PROP_NUMOP)
page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zwraca rezultaty '--------------------------------------------------------------------------- function getLP() getLP = g_nLPOp end function
function getNumOp() getNumOp = g_nNumOp end function
dim g_bSortCenaASC:g_bSortCenaASC = true dim g_bSortDataASC:g_bSortDataASC = true dim g_bSortQtyASC:g_bSortQtyASC = true dim g_bSortNrASC:g_bSortNrASC = false
function sort_nr
dim pSupplyCursor
if g_bSortNrASC then set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true,"") g_bSortNrASC = false else set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true," gms_nNumOp desc, gms_nLP desc ") g_bSortNrASC = true end if
if (pSupplyCursor is nothing) then view_message 6310, 0 exit function end if
fill_table pSupplyCursor , false
end function
function sort_qty
dim pSupplyCursor
if g_bSortQtyASC then set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true," gms_curIlosc asc ") g_bSortQtyASC = false else set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true," gms_curIlosc desc ") g_bSortQtyASC = true end if
if (pSupplyCursor is nothing) then view_message 6310, 0 exit function end if
fill_table pSupplyCursor , false
end function
function sort_price
dim pSupplyCursor
if g_bSortCenaASC then set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true," gms_curCena asc ") g_bSortCenaASC = false else set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true," gms_curCena desc ") g_bSortCenaASC = true end if
if (pSupplyCursor is nothing) then view_message 6310, 0 exit function end if
fill_table pSupplyCursor , false
end function
function sort_date
dim pSupplyCursor
if g_bSortDataASC then set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true," gms_dDataWazn asc ") g_bSortDataASC = false else set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true," gms_dDataWazn desc ") g_bSortDataASC = true end if
if (pSupplyCursor is nothing) then view_message 6310, 0 exit function end if
fill_table pSupplyCursor , false
end function
function get_quick(byval strOrder)
dim pSupplyCursor set pSupplyCursor = g_pPosition.n5pozdokmag_dostawy_cursor_dis(true,strOrder)
if not (pSupplyCursor.EOF) then dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(PROP_LPOP) = CLng(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_nLP").value) hli.prop(PROP_NUMOP) = CLng(pSupplyCursor.fields("gms_nNumOp").value)
supply_on_choice hli
end if
end function
function get_by_price_min get_quick " gms_curCena asc " end function
function get_by_data_wazn get_quick " gms_dDataWazn asc " end function
function get_by_price_max get_quick " gms_curCena desc " end function

t.tip: Kliknij aby posortować po numerze operacji
Kliknij aby posortować po cenie dostawy
Kliknij aby posortować po ilości w dostawie
Kliknij aby posortować po dacie ważności
